teamObjective.explanation: Deterministically repaired ToM trace with objective protect_partner.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner (player 2, 3 cards) has no public signals yet. With my hand being four low spades, I have no strong lead to set up a specific suit; a low single preserves any partner control and avoids forcing partner to reveal strength prematurely.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponents (players 1 and 3, 3 cards each) are unknown. Leading low minimizes information leakage about my hand shape and avoids inviting an opponent with a higher card or bomb to take cheap control.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Selected play-single-spade-3-copy1 after deterministic schema repair of ToM reasoning.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Legal alternative retained for verifier comparison after schema repair.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.
